content: A former student of the Sichuan Foreign Language School, Zhu Shi, a top performer in math and physics competitions, died in her dormitory on May 18, 2024. Her classmates wrote a tribute, but the article was deleted by the platform. title: 耿同学，一个退学博士是怎么用AI降维打击学术圈的？ | 原文
content: The article reports how a former Ph.D. student, known on Bilibili as “Geng Tongxue,” used AI to expose paper fraud by five senior scholars from major Chinese universities, all holding prestigious awards. In the same period, a regular netizen titled “Poetic Forest” launched a year‑long textual comparison campaign, accusing almost forty writers—including prominent figures such as Yang Benfen, Jia Pingwo, and Jia Qianqian—of plagiarism. Both cases triggered significant upheaval in China’s academic and literary communities.

title: Electrobun 2.0 will be decoupled from Bun due to the rust rewrite
content: Electrobun 2.0 will be released as a separate project from Bun. The new version has been rewritten in Rust, which allows it to run independently without relying on Bun’s JavaScript runtime. This decoupling is due to the language change and the desire to build a standalone tool that no longer shares Bun’s codebase.

title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
content: The repository provides 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents, mapped to five frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, and NIST AI RMF. It follows the agentskills.io standard and supports over 20 platforms, including Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, covering 26 security domains. The project, written in Python, is licensed under Apache 2.0 and has 6,875 stars and 971 forks.

title: 锂电池本周行业更新5-23（锂矿の最终幻想）
content: Lithium‑battery supply data show shrinking inventories despite production growth, and warehouse‑certificate volumes reflect tighter supply and active trading. Several key projects are delayed: JXW mine faces regulatory hurdles; Bald Hill and other regional mines will only produce by year‑end, while Zimbabwe and Nigeria restrictions reduce output. Export imports from Australia and Brazil remain steady, but volatile regions decline. The sector suffers from rigid upstream constraints, leading to higher lithium prices and a looming supply‑demand mismatch.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 柯中

title: Rubish: A Unix shell written in pure Ruby
content: Rubish is a Unix shell program implemented entirely in Ruby. It provides command‑line functionality typical of a shell while using only the Ruby language and its standard libraries. The project is open source and available on GitHub, where users can clone the repository, install dependencies via RubyGems, and run the shell. It is designed for developers who prefer scripting in Ruby but need shell capabilities. The project also includes documentation and an example workflow for deploying the shell.

title: Agentic Engineering 的一些心得
content: Three months of agentic development taught the author that constraints, clear specifications, and a design‑→spec‑→plan‑→implement workflow prevent problems. Code is the agent’s best guide; avoid relying on visual JSON or HTML outputs. Use a Git repo as the primary memory and context; a .memory folder and post‑hook handle synchronization. Practice different languages, architectures, and tools; AI can teach but not replace human judgment. Keep a single authoritative documentation repo, standardize where specs, schemas, and API definitions live, and let agents call each other’s tools for coordination.
eventKey: agentic-engineering-的一些心得
normalizedTitle: agentic engineering 的一些心得

title: I Imagined Hermes Agent Running an Entire Smart City — And It Changed How I See AI
content: Hermes Agent demonstrates that AI can move beyond simple chat responses to reason, plan, and act autonomously. By integrating tools and multi‑step execution, it reshapes how developers envision applications such as Trafiq AI—a smart traffic system that could monitor congestion, reroute vehicles, and prioritize emergencies in real time. The open‑source nature of Hermes Agent democratizes access, enabling students and independent creators to build sophisticated, action‑oriented AI systems. This suggests we are entering an era where AI actively manages complex environments rather than merely conversing.
eventKey: imagined-hermes-agent-running-entire-smart
normalizedTitle: i imagined hermes agent running an entire smart city — and it changed how i see ai

title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
content: Nemotron‑Labs Diffusion introduces diffusion language models that generate multiple tokens in parallel, refining them iteratively. The 3B, 8B, and 14B variants support three unified modes: standard autoregressive, block‑wise diffusion, and self‑speculation (draft‑verify). This design allows high throughput (up to 6× faster than pure autoregressive) without sacrificing accuracy, because the models are jointly trained on AR and diffusion objectives. The models are released under permissive NVIDIA licenses, with training code and HuggingFace checkpoints available, and can be deployed via SGLang.

title: DeepSeek 推进 100 亿美元融资 梁文锋承诺瞄准通用人工智能
content: DeepSeek, an AI startup, is finalizing a roughly 70 billion‑yuan ($9 billion) funding round with a pre‑money valuation near $45 billion. Its founder, Liang Wenfeng, says the company will prioritize innovative research, maintain an open‑source AI model strategy, and pursue general artificial intelligence, with investments from Tencent Holdings, IDG Capital, and Monolith Capital likely confirmed.

title: Manus 创始人拟融资回购，赴港股 IPO
content: Manus founders plan to raise about $1 billion to buy back the company from Meta, valuing it at $2–3 billion. The funds will form a Chinese joint venture and aim for a Hong Kong IPO, where AI unicorns command higher valuations. The $1 billion covers only part of the price; founders and existing shareholders must contribute more, and new investors may include state‑owned funds or strategic partners. The buy‑back also involves redefining ownership of trade secrets, data, and IP. Successful execution could lead to a 2026 Hong Kong listing, giving early investors an exit.

content: Anthropic forecasts a second‑quarter revenue of $11 billion, double its prior quarter’s earnings, and expects a profit of $600 million. Its annualized revenue is projected to approach $45 billion, surpassing OpenAI’s $25 billion.

content: 当地时间周四，SpaceX 在发射前夕因排查出多项问题，推迟了原计划在得克萨斯州南部星港发射场执行的星舰第十二次大型飞行任务。此次发射原定日期恰逢该公司正式递交首次公开募股申请，计划募资最高 750 亿美元，用于研发登月火星运载星舰、星链太空互联网项目及新兴人工智能业务。

title: 智谱发布 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，刷新全球大模型 API 速度纪录
content: Zhipu AI has released the GLM‑5.1 Turbo API, achieving 400 tokens per second. It is the first Chinese large model to combine flagship performance with low latency, challenging the usual lightweight‑only pattern. Tests show strong results in AI programming, 3D gaming, and interactive interfaces. The speed comes from the TileRT high‑performance inference engine, collaboratively built by Zhipu’s GLM team and TileRT. The API is now available to enterprises through the Zhipu MaaS platform.

title: GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row
content: GitHub Copilot has been named a Leader in Gartner’s 2026 Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third consecutive year. The report praises Copilot’s comprehensive, agentic workflow—from code generation to review, security, and deployment—across editors, CLIs, and GitHub’s web, desktop, and mobile interfaces. Usage now spans 140,000 organizations and grows >100% YoY, driven by multiple AI models, extended integrations, and robust governance controls. GitHub continues to expand these capabilities to support end‑to‑end software delivery.
